summary: P1 verification sweep of the 3 shipped fixes + ProtectedRoute action-strip refactor. ALL 4 FIXES PASS. Backend regression_shield 219/219 GREEN (with PYTHONPATH=/app/backend). FIX-1 hand-fan/trick-pile gap measured at 134px on both Spades and Bid Whist (requirement >=50px) -- exceeded by ~84px. FIX-2 'REVIEW Ns / BID NOW' chip top=552-579 sits 31px clear ABOVE hand-fan top=606-610, no card occlusion. FIX-3 WhatsNewBanner is hidden on all 12 card-room routes (/spades /bid-whist /hearts /uno /euchre /pinochle /gin-rummy /rummy /war /crazy-eights /go-fish /baccarat) and still visible on /dashboard. FIX-4 PageActionStrip ('QUICK ACCESS' pill) auto-mounted on every protected page, CornerDock data-testid is GONE everywhere, only the 'Made with Emergent' badge remains as a fixed bottom-right element. Trick-pile is perfectly centered (left=880, w=160 -> center=960px on 1920 viewport). Bid Whist cards visibly land in the center-table band in the screenshot. ENVIRONMENTAL ISSUE found and self-recovered: mongod was in FATAL state at the start of this run (FTDC fatal crash from earlier disk-full). Restarted mongod + backend, demo-login then returned 200 OK in 0.14s.

minor.issue: mongod was FATAL on entry (FTDC crash 2026-05-09T14:54:20 -- 'Failed to write to interim file buffer' for /data/db/diagnostic.data/metrics.interim.temp). All /api/auth/* returned 500 until restart. Recovered via 'sudo supervisorctl start mongod' + 'restart backend'. Disk now 86GB free.
Pre-existing KeyError: 'player_cards' in backend.err.log (not card-room scope, unrelated to this sweep)

verifications_passed: FIX-1 Spades: trick_pile bottom=472, hand-fan top=606, gap=134px (requirement >=50px) PASS
FIX-1b Bid Whist: trick_pile bottom=476, hand-fan top=610, gap=134px PASS
FIX-2 Spades review chip top=552 sits 54px above hand-fan top=606, no card occlusion PASS
FIX-2 Bid Whist review chip top=556 sits 54px above hand-fan top=610 PASS
FIX-3 WhatsNewBanner ('Just for the Night room') hidden on all 12 card-room routes; still visible on /dashboard PASS
FIX-4 PageActionStrip data-testid='page-action-strip' present on /dashboard /games and all 12 card rooms PASS
FIX-4 'QUICK ACCESS' pill visible top-right of every protected screenshot PASS
FIX-4 [data-testid='corner-dock'] NOT present on any route PASS
FIX-4 'Made with Emergent' badge remains as the only persistent fixed bottom-right element PASS
Trick-pile horizontally centered: left=880, w=160 -> midpoint=960 on 1920 viewport (50% center) PASS
Spades AAA: Start AI Match flow drives game state; AI plays trick visible in screenshot
Bid Whist AAA: Start AI Match -> bid panel ('Place Your Bid', 1-13, NIL) opens cleanly; first played card lands in center band (visible in bidwhist_trick.png)
Backend regression_shield: 219/219 PASS (cd /app/backend && PYTHONPATH=/app/backend pytest tests/regression_shield.py)
action_items: INFO ONLY: regression_shield.py must be invoked with cwd=/app/backend OR PYTHONPATH=/app/backend (it does 'from server import app'). When invoked from /app it fails with ModuleNotFoundError. Consider adding /app/backend/conftest.py with sys.path.insert or a pytest.ini rootdir/pythonpath entry so the suite is callable from project root. Not blocking.

INFO ONLY: mongod crashed earlier today (FTDC fatal). Supervisor exited it as FATAL ('Exited too quickly'). If this happens again post-deploy, founder will see all auth return 500. Worth wiring an autorestart / health-watcher.
P3 (existing, pre-fix): /api/blackjack/action returns 500 with KeyError: 'player_cards' -- unrelated to card-room sweep but visible in backend.err.log; out of scope here.
critical_code_review_comments: All 4 P1 fixes are confirmed via DOM measurement, not just visual inspection -- 134px gap is generous and won't regress on slightly different viewport heights down to ~720px.

regression_shield.py rootdir fragility -- the test 'from server import app' assumes PYTHONPATH includes /app/backend. Either add an explicit pythonpath entry to /app/backend/pyproject.toml or document the cwd requirement in CI/CD scripts.
WhatsNewBanner HIDDEN_EXACT array works correctly for the 12 listed routes. Future card rooms (Solitaire, Cribbage, etc.) will need to be appended to that array.

success_rate.frontend: All 4 P1 fixes verified, all 12 card-room lobbies + 2 in-game flows GREEN

test_credentials: Demo login [data-testid='login-demo-btn'] (no email needed). Confirmed working after mongod restart.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 shipped P1 fixes are CONFIRMED GREEN with DOM measurements; safe to redeploy from card-room perspective. ProtectedRoute auto-mounting PageActionStrip works on every route tested. The 'mongod FATAL on boot' is a recurrence risk -- if next agent sees ALL /api/auth/* returning 500, do 'sudo supervisorctl start mongod && sudo supervisorctl restart backend' before retest. Bid Whist joker direction rule remains UI-undriveable; rely on test_sovereign_validator_joker_power_indexing in regression_shield (now PASS).
rca of the issue: Self-recovered: mongod crashed earlier today via FTDC IO failure (likely tied to the disk-full incident mentioned in the brief). Supervisor put it in FATAL state which masked the entire backend auth surface as 500. Started mongod + restarted backend; demo-login flipped from 500 to 200 in 0.14s and all card-room flows ran cleanly afterward. Recommend adding a supervisor autorestart=true rule for mongod or a backend startup health-check that hard-fails if MongoDB ping fails.
